name: @motica/test
description: motica test program — exhaustive deterministic engine validation

scripts.coverage: cd .. && c8 --src packages/engine/src --src packages/ingest/src --src packages/render/src --include 'packages/engine/src/**' --include 'packages/ingest/src/**' --include 'packages/render/src/**' --extension .ts --temp-directory /tmp/motica-c8 --reports-dir /tmp/motica-c8-report --reporter=text-summary --check-coverage --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --statements 100 ts-node --transpile-only -P test/tsconfig.json test/src/index.ts

author: Samchon
